_meta.source: get_variable_defs on 25983:72091 (frame) — identical payload for 25983:73359 (Row-based Zebra)
_meta.note: Includes variables from embedded AG Grid chrome (badge-status, button, pagination, text-field) that are out of scope for the table restyle. Table-relevant keys: Background/Container/On Light/Low + Lowest, Divider/On Light/Subdued + Default, Text/On Light/Default, Font-size/300, Body/Font Weight/Bold + Regular, loop/ag-grids/h-padding + v-padding, loop/scroll-bar/height, Background/Container/On Light/High.
